super_admin.label: Platform Admin
super_admin.description: Manages the full Sentinel Health platform across care organizations.

org_admin.label: Organization Admin
org_admin.description: Full administrative control within one care organization.

compliance_admin.label: Safety Admin
compliance_admin.description: Manages governance rules, alerts, and oversight controls.

operator.label: Operations Lead
operator.description: Manages integrations, API keys, and operational testing.

auditor.label: Auditor
auditor.description: Reviews logs, reports, and safety evidence.
